title: Patchwork Health - NHS Staff Flexible Working Platform
problem: NHS faces chronic staff shortages. Managing shift work and bank staff is inefficient, leading to gaps in coverage.
solution: Platform enabling healthcare staff to pick up flexible shifts across NHS trusts, matching availability with staffing needs.
technology: Staffing platform, shift management, mobile app
varden_fit: Low — staff scheduling, not patient-facing. Different segment.
notes: NHS staffing innovation. Not directly relevant to Varden.
